labels.notes:
Father (Steven Davidson, triceps tendonopathy/fatty liver/gallbladder polyps) + son (Knight Davidson, post-infectious cough) seen as one encounter on Room 2 (2026-05-11 13:04). Multi-patient detect fired at confidence 0.95. Pre-v0.10.88 this archived as a single session with tabbed SOAP and one shared billing record (A004A qty=2, applied K013A upgrade). Post-v0.10.88 the encounter auto-splits into 2 sibling sessions (sibling_group_id shared) each with its own A004A + prorated Q310A. expected_failures pinned while the corpus still contains pre-fix pre-split labels; remove once the regression CLI sees 2 sibling sessions for this group_id and tightens the gate.

For Phase H follow-up: capture and sanitize this session's replay_bundle.json into tauri-app/src-tauri/tests/fixtures/encounter_bundles/seed/ to drive harness_per_encounter coverage of the auto-split path end-to-end.
